item.title: Fundamentals of protected.
item.description: Linear combination นี่คือ vector 2 มิติ $$ \begin{bmatrix} a & b \\ c & d \end{bmatrix} $$ hello world $$ f(\alpha x + \beta y) = \alpha x f(x) + \beta y f(y) $$ for all n-vectors x, y, and all scalars α, β. This property is called superposition. A function that satisfies the superposition property is called linear.
